name: Frank's Place Crawfish Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in flour until smooth.
3. Return to heat and cook, stirring, for 10 minutes, until the roux is dark brown.
4. Stir in chopped green onion, celery, and garlic; cook about 10 minutes.
5. Add tomato paste to fish stock; stir into onion mixture.
6. Add tomatoes, crayfish, parsley, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper; cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
7. Serve over hot rice.
Note: Make fish stock from heads and tails of fish and/or crawfish.
